title: Listening - Part 3
instructions: Complete the notes with a word or short phrase.

content.speaker: Liam
content.audio_script:
Hello everyone. My name’s Liam, and today I’m going to tell you about a local sports programme.

The project first started at the [1]sports centre[/1], where a group of students wanted to learn something new after school. 
At first, only a few people joined, but more students became interested very quickly.

We usually meet on [2]Saturday mornings[/2], because that’s when most people are free. 
Everyone is encouraged to bring [3]blue T-shirts[/3] or any equipment they already have at home.

During breaks, students often visit the nearby [4]healthy snacks[/4] together to relax and chat. 
At the end of the course, all participants can share their work in an [5]team leaders[/5], which friends and family can visit.

Personally, I think the best part of the experience is [6]new friends[/6], because it helps students become more confident and creative.

Thanks for listening.

dialogue.speaker: liam
dialogue.text:
Hello everyone. My name’s Liam, and today I’m going to tell you about a local sports programme.

The project first started at the sports centre, where a group of students wanted to learn something new after school. 
At first, only a few people joined, but more students became interested very quickly.

We usually meet on Saturday mornings, because that’s when most people are free. 
Everyone is encouraged to bring blue T-shirts or any equipment they already have at home.

During breaks, students often visit the nearby healthy snacks together to relax and chat. 
At the end of the course, all participants can share their work in an team leaders, which friends and family can visit.

Personally, I think the best part of the experience is new friends, because it helps students become more confident and creative.

Thanks for listening.
